'''Daranu''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|Alcoholic]] beverage made from [[Terrberry|terrberries]] and select [[spicy nut]]s on [[Parein II 4/Legends|Parein II 4]], in the [[Sarin sector/Legends|Sarin sector]]. It was fermented in [[Parein Sweetgreen Fruit]] hardnut shells. The taste was said to be very soothing and refreshing until the alcohol hit like of a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolt around thirty [[Standard minute/Legends|standard minutes]] later.<ref name="GG9" /> The [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Nio]], residing on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Redcap]], was fond of imbibing daranu, even while driving.<ref name="J5">{{JournalCite|5|A Bitter Winter}}</ref>
